ddls:
CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province/state */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province/state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province/state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the province/state in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the province/state */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the province/state */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country to which the province/state belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province/state where the case was reported */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time the case was last updated */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recoveries */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the case (e.g., 0-9, 10-19, etc.) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the case (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the case (e.g., city, district) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the case */,
  "data_import_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data import batch of the case */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the case (e.g., fully vaccinated, partially vaccinated, not vaccinated) */,
  "travel_history" TEXT /* Travel history of the case (e.g., recent travel to high-risk areas) */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms reported by the case (e.g., fever, cough, shortness of breath) */,
  "hospitalization_status" TEXT /* Hospitalization status of the case (e.g., hospitalized, not hospitalized) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test used (e.g., PCR, antigen) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_data_import_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_import_id") REFERENCES data_imports ("data_import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidence_rates" (
  "incidence_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incidence rate */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province/state where the incidence rate was calculated */,
  "incidence_rate" REAL /* Incidence rate value */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the incidence rate was calculated */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the incidence rate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for the incidence rate */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location for the incidence rate */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the incidence rate */,
  "data_import_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data import batch of the incidence rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incidence_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidence_rates_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidence_rates_data_import_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_import_id") REFERENCES data_imports ("data_import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidence_rates_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_fatality_ratios" (
  "case_fatality_ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case-fatality ratio */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province/state where the case-fatality ratio was calculated */,
  "case_fatality_ratio" REAL /* Case-fatality ratio value */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the case-fatality ratio was calculated */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the case-fatality ratio */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for the case-fatality ratio */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location for the case-fatality ratio */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the case-fatality ratio */,
  "data_import_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data import batch of the case-fatality ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_fatality_ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_fatality_ratios_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_fatality_ratios_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_fatality_ratios_data_import_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_import_id") REFERENCES data_imports ("data_import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government report, health agency, research institution) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "data_quality_rating" INTEGER /* Data quality rating (1-5) */,
  "last_verified_date" TEXT /* Date the data source was last verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "data_import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source used for the import */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  "import_time" TEXT /* Time the data was imported */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "import_size" TEXT /* Size of the imported data */,
  "import_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the import */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the system was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, data access) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "data_visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph, map) */,
  "data_used" TEXT /* Data used to create the visualization */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the visualization was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the visualization was last updated */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the visualization (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the report (e.g., public, private) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., data update, system alert) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Recipients of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
